registerNotes.pt: neutral-informal (você, standard Brazilian register, not European Portuguese)
registerNotes.zh-hant: plain, no honorifics (Traditional characters, Taiwan/Hong Kong register — distinct from zh's Simplified/mainland register)
registerNotes.tl: neutral-informal, code-switching with English UI terms is natural and expected
registerNotes.sv: neutral-informal (du — Swedish has no formal/informal distinction in practice)
registerNotes.ms: neutral-informal (anda), standard Bahasa Malaysia — not Indonesian
registerNotes.ar: Modern Standard Arabic (فصحى), neutral-direct register addressing the reader; concise UI phrasing, no dialect, no tashkeel; Western digits; Latin script kept for untranslatable product/technical terms
